label: CSS Anchor Positioning
summary: anchor-name / position-anchor / position-try-fallbacks — tether a popover to its trigger and auto-flip on overflow. Native-first positioning strategy for the anchor intent (#1262): registered as an additional resolver alongside the #149 floating-ui provider, promoted to default once it reaches Baseline (shipping all engines — FF 147, Safari 26 — but baseline: false until cross-browser-stable). The JS provider is the fallback.
